prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为 5108→5133→5447→9414→6383 名。2021–2023 年基本稳定在 5100–5450 名区间；2024 年因江西省首次新高考专业组拆分，最低位次骤降至 9414 名（再选不限组）；2025 年明显回升至 6383 名，反映新高考模式下的报考心理趋于稳定。近 2 年波动幅度较大，2025 年基准约 6383 名；该校在江西省物理类招生计划：2021 年 142 人、2022 年 151 人、2023 年 150 人、2024 年 165 人、2025 年 190 人，呈逐年扩招趋势；2026 年计划 162 人，较 2025 年缩招 28 人（约 14.7%），缩招幅度较大，将加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南大学为 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年第 31 名（2025 年第 29 名），稳居全国顶尖高校行列，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；该校在声誉监测中未出现明显负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第 16（高热），短视频曝光量高，反映社会关注度与报考热度较高；2021–2025 年投档异常数据中均未出现湖南大学，录取走势平稳；第五轮学科评估中 A- 及以上学科共 8 个：化学（A）、机械工程（A）、工商管理（A）、土木工程（A-）、应用经济学（A-）、控制科学与工程（A-）、电气工程（A-）、计算机科学与技术（A-），学科实力均衡且 与当前热门专业高度重合。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在 2026 年专业热度分析中均为高热推荐，湖南大学在上述领域均有 A- 及以上学科支撑，对考生吸引力强；江西省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 47.49 万，较 2025 年（约 47.25 万）微增约 0.5%，物理类考生估算约 26.78 万，竞争略有加剧；湖南大学位于长沙市，与江西省相邻，属于华中地区核心城市，对江西考生具有天然的地域亲近感；该校在 江西省招生人数占全国总招生比例约 3%–5%，属跨省招生中占比中等偏高的省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 6383 名、2026 年物理类计划缩招 14.7%（竞争加剧）、学校声誉良好且专业热度高、江西省考生总数微增等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次较 2025 年有所前移（更难进）。预测最低位次约 5849 名，区间 5349–6349 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 5108, 5133, 5447, 9414, and 6383 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, it was basically stable in the 5100–5450 range. In 2024, due to the first split of major groups under the new college entrance examination in Jiangxi Province, the minimum ranking dropped sharply to 9414 (for the group with no re-selection restrictions). In 2025, it rebounded significantly to 6383, reflecting a stabilization of application psychology under the new exam model. The fluctuation range has been large in the past two years, with a baseline of about 6383 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province for Physics Category: 142 in 2021, 151 in 2022, 150 in 2023, 165 in 2024, and 190 in 2025, showing a trend of gradual expansion. The 2026 plan is 162, a reduction of 28 (about 14.7%) compared to 2025, which is a significant reduction and will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 31st (29th in 2025), firmly in the top tier of national universities, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring candidates. No significant negative public opinion has been detected in reputation monitoring. It ranks 16th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting high social attention and application heat. From 2021 to 2025, no abnormal admission data appeared for Hunan University, indicating stable admission trends. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 8 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry (A), Mechanical Engineering (A), Business Administration (A), Civil Engineering (A-), Applied Economics (A-), Control Science and Engineering (A-), Electrical Engineering (A-), and Computer Science and Technology (A-), with balanced disciplinary strength and high overlap with current popular majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended in the 2026 major popularity analysis. Hunan University has A- or above disciplinary support in these fields, making it highly attractive to candidates. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination is about 474,900, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 2025 (about 472,500). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 267,800, with slightly intensified competition. Hunan University is located in Changsha City, adjacent to Jiangxi Province, and is a core city in Central China, giving it a natural geographical affinity for Jiangxi candidates. The proportion of enrollment in Jiangxi Province to total national enrollment is about 3%–5%, which is a moderately high proportion among cross-provincial enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6383, the 14.7% reduction in Physics Category enrollment plan for 2026 (intensified competition), the university's good reputation and high major popularity, and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangxi Province, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025 (harder to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is about 5849, with a range of 5349–6349.

Tier 2 (Medium)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Chemistry (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, Chemical Biology)

- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Science, Environmental Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 5849, with a range of 5349–6349. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (5349) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 5800) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Mathematics and Intelligent Manufacturing, while also applying for Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (6349) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net while striving for Tier 2 majors. Hunan University offers a wide range of majors in Physics Category in Jiangxi Province, with many disciplines rated A- or above. Candidates can reasonably combine their choices of sprint, stable, and safety options based on their rankings.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were 892→981→956→1820→1063 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, they were basically stable in the 892–981 range; in 2024, due to the first new college entrance examination major group split in Jiangxi Province, the minimum ranking dropped sharply to 1820 (pulled down by the Radio and Television Directing major); in 2025, it rebounded significantly to 1063, reflecting a stabilization of application psychology under the new exam model. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1063. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangxi: 25 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 30 in 2024, 24 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 68, an increase of 44 students (about 183%) compared to 2025, a huge expansion that will significantly reduce competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 31st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities nationwide, with strong appeal to Liberal Arts/History Category candidates; no significant negative public opinion has been detected in reputation monitoring; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 16th (high heat), reflecting high social attention; no abnormal data in the 2021–2025 admission data for Hunan University, indicating stable admission trends; Hunan University's A- and above disciplines related to History Category include Business Administration (A) and Applied Economics (A-), providing disciplinary support for economics and management majors; although Law is not in A- or above, it is recommended by social heat.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language and Literature/Liberal Arts and other liberal arts majors are recommended or relatively hot in the 2026 major popularity analysis; the estimated number of History Category candidates in Jiangxi Province in 2026 is about 207,100, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 2025 (about 206,100); Hunan University is located in Changsha City, adjacent to Jiangxi Province, giving it a natural regional affinity for Jiangxi candidates; the university's enrollment number for History Category in Jiangxi has been about 24–30 in recent years, and will significantly expand to 68 in 2026, reflecting the university's emphasis on History Category students from Jiangxi.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1063, the 2026 History Category plan expansion of 183% (significantly reduced competition), good university reputation, and a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangxi Province, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be significantly lower (easier to enter) than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2202, with a range of 1872–2532.

- Economics (Economics, Public Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- Finance

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 2202, with a range of 1872–2532. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (1872) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Law and Economics majors; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 2200) are advised to focus on Tier 2 Chinese Language and Literature and History; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (2532) are advised to use Tier 3 Public Administration and Business Administration as safety options. With the 2026 History Category expansion to 68 students, overall admission opportunities have significantly increased, and candidates can appropriately broaden their sprint range.
